customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer, created using the [Create Customer](https://docs.y.uno/reference/create-customer) endpoint (UUID, 36 chars).

merchant_order_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer's order (MAX 255; MIN 3).

payment_description.description: The description of the payment (MAX 255; MIN 3).

callback_url.description: The URL where we will redirect your customer after making the purchase. Required for alternative payment methods with redirection. (MAX 526; MIN 3)

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account. You find this information on [the Yuno dashboard](https://dashboard.y.uno/) (UUID, 36 chars).

amount.description: Specifies the payment amount object, with the value and currency.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payment (MAX 3; MIN 3; [ISO 4217](country-reference)).

alternative_amount.description: Alternative currency representation of the transaction amount.

metadata.description: Specifies a list of metadata objects. You can add up to 120 metadata objects.

installments.description: The object to send the installment plan created in Yuno to show your customers and let them choose from. This optional field is used in case a particular installments plan needs to be used in the session. if not sent, we will display the installment plan created for the account for each scenario, if any.

plan_id.description: Plan Id of the installment plan created in Yuno

plan.description: Installments to show the customer in with the checkout_session. This optional struct is used in case a particular installments plan needs to be used in the session and does not have an installments plan created for it. if not sent, we will display the installment plan created for the account for each scenario, if any.

installment.description: The number of monthly installments shoppers can choose

rate.description: The rate that will be applied to the final amount of the transaction by the payment provider after using installments. Expressed in percentage.

items.example: The merchant has no authorization to use this API.

parameters.name: checkout_session
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the checkout session (UUID, 36 chars).

items.example: The merchant has no authorization to use this API.

get.description: This request retrieves a checkout session using its unique identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the checkout session (UUID, 36 chars).

id.description: The unique identifier of the checkout session (MAX 64; MIN 36).

merchant_order_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer's order (MAX 255; MIN 3).

country.description: Country where the transaction must be processed (MAX 2; MIN 2; ISO 3166-1).

payment_description.description: The description of the payment (MAX 255; MIN 3).

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer (MAX 64; MIN 36).

callback_url.description: The URL where to redirect the customer after the payment (MAX 526; MIN 3).

amount.description: Specifies the payment amount object, with the value and currency.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payment (MAX 3; MIN 3; ISO 4217).

created_at.description: Checkout Session creation date and time (MAX 27; MIN 27; ISO 8601).

metadata.description: Specifies a list of metadata objects. You can add up to 50 metadata objects.

value.description: Specifies the value for the defined metadata key.

workflow.description: The payment workflow type that specifies how the checkout session will be processed.

installments.description: The object to send the installment plan created in Yuno to show your customers and let them choose from.

plan_id.description: Specifies a plan id created in Yuno to show your customer in the checkout session (MAX 64; MIN 64).

plan.description: Installments to show the customer with the checkout session.

installment.description: The number of monthly installments shoppers can choose.

rate.description: The rate that will be applied to the final amount of the transaction by the payment provider after using installments.

used.description: Specifies whether a checkout session was used previously or not.

items.example: The merchant has no authorization to use this API.

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: Defines the payment method used to filter issuers. This parameter ensures the response includes only issuers that support the specified payment method
